ab: Talib, katawalan aku ku sapisulit, taneng pacaliw kisu i takuwanan haw?
ch: W:Talib，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Talib, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: nayi’ ku nu maku, ni Baluay kuyni.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Balu’s.

ab: taneng pacaliwen henay kaku haw? dadawa kaku panukas i tisuwan.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: hang, alaen.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: kukay, padangen kaku a mikukay ci Baluan.
en: Thank you and thank Balu for me.

ab: u canan ku kaydihan?
en: May I help you?

ab: a panukas kaku tuyni tusaay cudad.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: hang i, idaw hen ku kaydihan?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: maydih henay micaliw tu tuluay a cudad kaku.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: hantu. katineng tulu a demiad panukas han tu.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: caay henay panukas kisu tu sabulic i takuwan.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: mapanukas tu aku nacila.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: kya caay tu kaadih ku sabulic nu maku.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: sipacaliw tu nu misu ci nabaan.
en: Maybe you lend it to Maduhay.

ab: caay katineng kaku. palitaen aku cinida.
en: I don’t know. If so, let me go and ask her first.

ab: pacaliwen aku kisu nu makuay a sabulic.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Lengus, nipacaliw ni Ngayaw i tisuwan kina kabung haw?
en: Lengus, did Ngayaw lend you this coat?

ab: caay, nicakayan ni ina aku pabeli i takuwanan.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: malecad ku kabung isu atu ni Ngayaw.
en: Ngayaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: u lumeni’ay ku kabung nida, caay kalecad ku kulit niyam.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, na micaliw kisu tu kalisiw ci Kacawan haw?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

ab: idaw, a panukas kaku ayda a demiad cinidaan, katawalan aku ku kalisiw.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: ayaan tu kisu panukas?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: ancila panukas han tu nu maku cinidaan.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: hang i, sakamu han tu nu maku ci Kacaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.
